en.services.title: Implementation Services
en.services.subtitle: Six core practice areas — each grounded in production experience.
en.services.s1.title: Claude Integration Architecture
en.services.s1.desc: Design, deploy, and scale production-grade Claude systems with zero vendor lock-in. Architecture review, API integration, and performance optimization.
en.services.s2.title: Knowledge Management Systems
en.services.s2.desc: Turn institutional knowledge into competitive advantage. Semantic search, RAG pipelines, and enterprise knowledge graphs.
en.services.s3.title: Legacy Code Modernization
en.services.s3.desc: From technical debt to technical leverage. Automated refactoring, migration, and AI-assisted codebase analysis.
en.services.s4.title: Agentic Workflow Orchestration
en.services.s4.desc: Autonomous execution at enterprise scale. Multi-agent systems, tool-use frameworks, and human-in-the-loop oversight.
en.services.s5.title: Defensive AI Security
en.services.s5.desc: Protect your AI systems from prompt injection and model extraction. Red-teaming, guardrails, and compliance audit.
en.services.s6.title: MLOps & Governance
en.services.s6.desc: Production-grade monitoring, fine-tuning, and compliance. Model lifecycle management and regulatory readiness.
en.methodology.title: Our Methodology
en.methodology.step1.title: Discovery & Audit
en.methodology.step1.desc: Deep-dive into your current AI landscape, data infrastructure, and business objectives.
en.methodology.step2.title: Architecture Design
en.methodology.step2.desc: Blueprint production-grade systems with security, scalability, and cost optimization built in.
en.methodology.step3.title: Implementation Sprint
en.methodology.step3.desc: Rapid, iterative development with weekly demos and continuous stakeholder validation.
en.methodology.step4.title: Production Deployment
en.methodology.step4.desc: Zero-downtime launch with monitoring, alerting, and rollback capabilities.
en.methodology.step5.title: Optimize & Scale
en.methodology.step5.desc: Continuous improvement and governance for sustained performance.

en.caseStudies.title: Proven Results
en.faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
en.faq.q1: What makes Smoothrevenue different from hiring an in-house AI team?
en.faq.a1: In-house AI teams require 6-12 months to hire, cost $800K-2M annually in salaries, and need time to understand your domain. We bring pre-built enterprise playbooks, validated across Fortune 500 deployments, that can be operational within weeks.
en.faq.q2: How do you handle data security and compliance?
en.faq.a2: Security is architectural, not an afterthought. We implement enterprise-grade isolation, SOC 2 compliant workflows, and domain-specific compliance frameworks for financial services, healthcare, and regulated industries.
en.faq.q3: What is your pricing model and ROI expectations?
en.faq.a3: We structure engagements around outcome milestones, not time-and-materials. Typical projects range from $150K-500K for MVP through production. ROI targets are built into our contracts. Most clients see positive ROI within 6-9 months.
en.faq.q4: Do you work with our existing Claude accounts and vendors?
en.faq.a4: Yes. We integrate with existing Anthropic accounts and help optimize token usage and costs. Our consultants are vendor-agnostic. We recommend the right tools for your specific needs.
en.faq.q5: What does the typical engagement timeline look like?
en.faq.a5: Discovery takes 2 weeks. MVP delivery in 6-8 weeks. Full deployment in 12-16 weeks. We front-load validation. If an approach will not work, we identify it in the first month, not the third.
en.faq.q6: How do you measure success and report progress?
en.faq.a6: Every engagement has defined KPIs tied to business outcomes, not vanity metrics. We provide weekly progress reports with technical dashboards, monthly business impact reviews, and quarterly executive summaries.
en.faq.q7: What industries do you specialize in?
en.faq.a7: Financial services, healthcare, logistics, and enterprise SaaS with complex compliance requirements. We focus on industries where AI failures have real consequences, where accuracy, auditability, and reliability are not optional.
en.faq.q8: What happens after deployment? Do you provide ongoing support?
en.faq.a8: Yes. All engagements include 90 days of hypercare support, documentation for your internal teams, and knowledge transfer sessions. For ongoing optimization, we offer retainer agreements. Most clients stay with us because the value compounds over time.
